welcome.title: Rahal
welcome.subtitle: Uncover the World Around You
welcome.description: Join the expedition, explore hidden relics, and catalog your discoveries.

signIn.title: Welcome Back
signIn.subtitle: Access your archival records to continue the quest.

signUp.title: Begin Your Journey
signUp.subtitle: Catalog your discoveries in the eternal city.
signUp.passwordPlaceholder: Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, symbol
signUp.profilePictureHelper: Optional. JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP up to 5 MB.
signUp.isPublicDescription: Allow other explorers to see your profile
signUp.successToast: Account created. Check your email for the verification code.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Enter the six-digit catalog code we sent to your inbox.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: A fresh verification code has been sent.
verifyEmail.invalidCode: That code is invalid or expired. Try again or request a new code.
verifyEmail.resendUnavailable: We couldn't send a new code. If your email is already verified, sign in.

forgotPassword.title: Recover Access
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset code.
forgotPassword.successToast: If that email exists, a reset code has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Set a New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Use the reset code from your email.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.alreadyExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.lockedOut: Your account has been locked. Please try again later.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in.
errors.validation: Please check your input and try again.
errors.invalidCode: That code is invalid or expired. Try again or request a new code.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
errors.passwordWeak: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.nameLength: Name must be between 3 and 100 characters.
errors.phoneFormat: Choose a country code and enter the phone number.
errors.birthDateFuture: Birth date must be in the past.
errors.birthDateTooOld: Please enter a valid birth date.
errors.otpInvalid: Enter the six-digit code from your email.
errors.bioTooLong: Bio must be 500 characters or less.
errors.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in needs OAuth client IDs before it can be used.
errors.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is unavailable right now. Please try again.
errors.network: No internet connection. Please check your network.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
